basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Science or Engineering (including relevant branches such as Biotechnology, Bioengineering, and Biomedical Engineering); OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Master's degree in Science or Engineering (including relevant branches such as Biotechnology, Bioengineering, and Biomedical Engineering); OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience. Desirable: Expertise in animal cell culture and microfabrication technique.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Project Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Fellow position at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Fellow position at IIT Guwahati is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application is completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree in Science or Engineering (including Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Biomedical Engineering) or a Bachelor's degree in Engineering with at least 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 32,400.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Fellow position at IIT Guwahati will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Fellow position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Fellow position at IIT Guwahati is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Project Fellow position at IIT Guwahati is entirely online.

faq.question: Q10. When will the shortlisted candidates be informed?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email on 22nd June 2026.
